name: Roivant Sciences Ltd.
description: Roivant Sciences Ltd. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to improving the delivery of healthcare to patients. The company focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative medicines and technologies. Roivant operates by building "Vants"—nimble, entrepreneurial subsidiary companies—that leverage a unique approach to sourcing talent, aligning incentives, and deploying technology to accelerate drug development. Its diverse portfolio includes treatments for various conditions, such as psoriasis, while simultaneously incubating health technology startups that complement its core biopharmaceutical business. Roivant aims to transform the industry by rapidly delivering impactful therapies to patients in need.
